templates.name: The Hard Truth Call-out

structure.hook: Start with a direct contradiction or a harsh reality (0-3s).
structure.tension: Explain why the listener's current approach is failing (3-15s).
structure.solution: Introduce the MindFrame perspective or a specific psychological framework (15-45s).
structure.proof: A one-sentence benefit of applying this shift (45-55s).
structure.cta: Call to action for the email list/lead magnet (55-60s).

templates.example:
Hook: You don't have a motivation problem. You have a clarity problem.
Tension: You wake up and wait for the 'feeling' to work. But feelings are fickle. High-performers don't wait for feelings.
Solution: At MindFrame, we use the 2-Minute Rule combined with 'Environment Priming'. You don't decide to work; you simply enter a pre-configured environment.
Proof: When friction is zero, discipline is automatic.
CTA: Download our Frictionless Workspace Guide. Link in bio.

templates.name: The Stoic Wisdom Flip

structure.hook: Quote or concept from a Stoic philosopher (0-5s).
structure.modern_context: Translate this to a modern productivity/life struggle (5-20s).
structure.application: Actionable step to apply this today (20-50s).
structure.cta: Call to action for the premium community/membership (50-60s).

templates.example:
Hook: Marcus Aurelius once said: 'The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.'
Modern Context: Your 'distractions' aren't obstacles to your work. They ARE your training ground for focus.
Application: Every time you feel the urge to check your phone, treat it as a rep in the gym of focus. Don't fight it—observe it, and return to the task.
CTA: Join the MindFrame Circle for weekly mental training sessions. Link in bio.

templates.name: The System Reveal

structure.hook: Visual or verbal hook showing a high-level outcome (0-3s).
structure.cta: Call to action for a paid template/product (55-60s).

templates.example:
Hook: How to build a second brain using AI in 60 seconds.
Component 1: Capture. Use a voice-to-text AI to dump every idea instantly.
Component 2: Distill. Use a custom GPT to categorize and link these ideas to your projects.
Component 3: Execute. Review your 'Actionable Inbox' every 24 hours.
Summary: You stop remembering information and start using it.
CTA: Get our complete AI Second Brain template. Link in bio.
